zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Verney於1450年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾福利特 馬爾斯頓時，他的父親Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London40歲，母親Emma Piking38歲。他與Margaret Whittingham結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾德波利被列為sheriff of。他去世於1505年8月31日在英國賀特福爾阿爾德波利享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾登哈姆聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Verney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Varney
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from a French place called Vernay, probably chiefly Saint-Paul-de-Vernay (Calvados). The placename comes from a derivative of Gaulish verno- ‘alder’ + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Verney was born in 1450, in Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London, was 40 and his mother, Emma Piking, was 38. He married Margaret Whittingham. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as sheriff of in Aldbury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 31 August 1505, in Aldbury, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in St. John the Baptist Churchyard, Aldenham, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Margaret Whittingham. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of à Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 31 août 1505, à Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à St. John the Baptist Churchyard, Aldenham, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Verney è nato il nel 1450 nel Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Emma Piking, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Whittingham. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of nel Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Verneyが1450年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアフリート マーストンで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of Londonは40歳，母Emma Pikingは38歳であった。Margaret Whittinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルドブリーでの職業はsheriff ofと記録されている。彼は1505年8月31日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルドブリーで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルデンハムスト. ジョン ス バプティスト チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.St John the Baptist Churchyard, Aldbury,: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알데함 스트. 존 테 바프티스트 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Verney(이)가 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 플릿 마스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Piking(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Margaret Whittingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알드버이에서 sheriff of이었다. 그는 1505년 8월 31일 영국 허트퍼드실르 알드버이에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알데함 스트. 존 테 바프티스트 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Verney nasceu em 1450, em Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Emma Piking, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Whittingham. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of em Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. ru.St John the Baptist Churchyard, Aldbury,: ст. джон т баптист чурчярд, алденам, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Verney родился в 1450 г. в местности флит марстон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Piking, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Whittingham. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of в местности алдбури, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 31 августа 1505 г. в местности алдбури, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности ст. джон т баптист чурчярд, алденам, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Verney nació en 1450, en Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Emma Piking, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Margaret Whittingham. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of en Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1505, en Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en St. John the Baptist Churchyard, Aldenham, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
